literal-translation: And created God the sea-monsters the great and every soul the living the creeping which swarmed the waters to kind of them and every fowl wing to kind of it and saw God that good.
And blessed them God saying be fruitful and multiply and fill the waters in the seas and the fowl let multiply in the earth.
And was evening and was morning day fifth.
And said God let bring forth the earth soul living to kind of it cattle and creeping-thing and beast of earth to kind of it and was so.
And made God beast of the earth to kind of it and the cattle to kind of it and every creeping-thing of the ground to kind of it and saw God that good.

And said God let us make man in image of us according to likeness of us and let them rule in fish of the sea and in fowl of the heavens and in the cattle and in all the earth and in every the creeping-thing the creeping upon the earth.
And created God the man in image of him in image of God created him male and female created them.

And blessed them God and said to them God be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth and subdue it and rule in fish of the sea and in fowl of the heavens and in every living-thing the creeping upon the earth.
And said God behold I have given to you every herb seeding seed which upon faces of all the earth and every the tree which in it fruit of tree seeding seed to you it shall be for food.
And to every beast of the earth and to every fowl of the heavens and to every creeping-thing upon the earth which in it soul living every greenness of herb for food and was so.
And saw God all which he made and behold good very and was evening and was morning day the sixth.
And were finished the heavens and the earth and all host of them.
And finished God in day the seventh work of him which he made and rested in day the seventh from all work of him which he made.
And blessed God day the seventh and sanctified it because in it he rested from all work of him which created God to make.
These generations of the heavens and the earth in being created of them in day of making Yahweh God earth and heavens.
And every plant of the field before was in earth and every herb of the field before sprouted because not caused-rain Yahweh God upon the earth and man none to till the ground.
And mist went up from the earth and watered all faces of the ground.
And formed Yahweh God the man dust from the ground and breathed in nostrils of him breath of lives and was the man to soul living.
And planted Yahweh God garden in Eden from east and set there the man which he formed.
And caused-grow Yahweh God from the ground every tree desirable to sight and good to food and tree of the lives in middle of the garden and tree of the knowledge good and evil.
